building-elements.proposed-materials: Allow to install a small metal exhaust, 20cm diameter, finished in matte black, at the rear elevation. See drawing A-202.

building-elements.existing-materials: Timber sash window with single glazed units, frame painted white
building-elements.proposed-materials: Rotten timber areas to be removed, new timber elements grafted in place; all timber elements to be primed and finished with white paint finish; glass to be replaced with slimline double glazed units.

Front door at upper ground floor: solid timber door painted black; back door at upper ground floor: solid timber door with glass, painted black; back door at lower ground floor: solid timber door with glass, painted black. Please refer to drawing A-901 for complete door schedule.

Original timber floorboards to be replaced on a like-for-like basis where missing or damaged. New engineered wood floor coverings to be installed following the removal of modern carpet and vinyl floor coverings, tile floors to be introduced in bathrooms.
Bedroom walls: timber stud and plasterboard painted white. Bathroom walls: finished with large format ceramic tiles.
Various proposed materials. Please refer to A-901 for complete door schedule.
